narrative.headline: What 2014 Honda Accord owners report most
narrative.summary: Electrical system complaints make up the largest share of owner reports, with several owners describing sudden, unintended vehicle movement at low speeds without driver input. Engine and steering complaints follow, with owners noting intermittent hesitation under acceleration and handling difficulties in cold weather. Brake-related reports frequently describe loss of power steering assist accompanied by a dashboard warning light, suggesting an overlap between the steering and electrical concerns.

issues.sample: I PURCHASED NEW 2014 HONDA ACCORD ON 1/27/14 WITH 34 MILES.  ON 1/31/14 WITH ONLY 117 MILES, I WAS ATTEMPTING TO PARK, PERHAPS 2 MPH WHEN ALL OF THE SUDDEN, THE CAR LUNGED FORWARD ON IT'S OWN WITH GREAT FORCE. I WAS APPX 5 FEET AWAY FROM STOPPING WHEN SUDDENLY THE AIRBAG DEPLOYED
issues.title: Electrical System
issues.blurb: Owners report the vehicle lunging forward on its own at very low speed while attempting to park, without intentional driver input. · 4 fire · 5 crash · 8 injured

issues.title: Engine
issues.blurb: Owners report intermittent hesitation where pressing the accelerator at low speed produces no immediate response, followed by unexpected forward surge when the pedal is pressed further. · 2 fire · 2 crash · 5 injured

issues.title: Steering
issues.blurb: Owners report the leather-wrapped steering wheel becoming extremely slick and difficult to grip firmly during severe cold weather, even without gloves. · 1 fire · 13 crash · 10 injured

issues.blurb: Owners report the vehicle suddenly becoming difficult to steer while driving, accompanied by the electric power steering warning light illuminating on the instrument panel. · 1 fire · 8 crash · 1 injured
